name: Forensic Heroes IV
overview: The forensics team and the crime team on Hong Kong's police force are challenged once again as the squad is staffed with new personnel. This time, the crime-solving police force led by Go Sir, Dr. Man, and King Sir, who all work together with their respective teams to solve murder mysteries.

trailers.title: 法證先鋒IV | 預告 | 陣容鼎盛 劇力萬均 必睇大劇
